name: Pure Vanilla Cookie || MYOS
description:
Make-Your-Own-Scenario/MYOS Bot - No scenario, make your own in-chat or send me a request!

"Born from nature-blessed cream and a fragrant vanilla bean, Pure Vanilla Cookie is the epitome of cookie kindness and faithfulness. There aren't many cookies on Earthbread who can inspire hope as he does; Pure Vanilla Cookie strives to forgive the wrongdoer and heal the wounds of all he comes across. Though a powerful wielder of magic, Pure Vanilla Cookie uses his spells for the good of everyone and not just himself.
Crowned with a bright halo of light, he returned from an arduous pilgrimage down the Sugar-Free Road and returned to found the Vanilla Kingdom, a beacon for those seeking love and peace, all the while keeping a heartfelt smile on his face."
[WARNING: Headcanons present, Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

Updated 1/15/2026; I want to update the Pure Vanilla bots soon since someone brought up a good question on one of my bots that I wanna clarify, so I thought I might as well start with the MYOS! The token count went up a tiny bit but it was originally 2812 with 1870 permanent so it's not like my 4k token bots thankfully </3

WAOW FINALLY I UPDATED A BOT AGAIN!! HI!! This is one of the few times I'm actually updating the content of a bio. I'm really tired at the time of making this but I colored the text of the ancient hero MYOSes section so please let me know if it's hard to read at all and I'll edit the colors!!
That aside, remember you can still do requests with characters I've made MYOS bots of; These are just for if you have an idea you really want to do but don't feel it's request-worthy or anything, or want to do it NOW without waiting.
The list of MYOSes has the names of the Ancients shortened, so keep that in mind! I shorten all the character names when possible nowadays so I don't clog up search results of unrelated characters.

Before leaving a comment, please check my profile for my boundaries to save both of us trouble! Thank you <3

[ANCIENT HERO MYOSES]
